evals.name: basic-project-audit
evals.prompt: audit my skills in the current project pta-cbp-parser vs global
evals.expected_output: Matrix showing all skills in project and global directories, with availability status (DUPLICATED, SHARED, GLOBAL_ONLY, PROJECT_ONLY), summary counts, and migration recommendations

evals.name: multi-project-comparison
evals.prompt: Compare skills across multiple projects. I have project A at ~/test-project-a and project B at ~/test-project-b. Show me what skills each has and what's missing.
evals.expected_output: Matrix with both projects listed, showing skill distribution and gaps. Recommendations for which project-specific skills should be promoted or shared.

evals.name: duplicate-detection
evals.prompt: Find duplicate or very similar skills in my entire skill ecosystem. I suspect some project-specific skills have similar descriptions to global ones.
evals.expected_output: Report listing similar skills with similarity percentages, descriptions, and recommendations for consolidation or archival

evals.name: domain-filtering
evals.prompt: Audit testing-related skills in my ecosystem. I want to see which testing skills I have globally and which are in my pta-cbp-parser project.
evals.expected_output: Filtered matrix showing only testing-related skills, with their locations and usage status

evals.name: gap-analysis
evals.prompt: I'm setting up a new project. Show me which global skills I have available and which project-specific skills from pta-cbp-parser might be relevant to copy.
evals.expected_output: Summary of global skills with descriptions, plus recommendations for which project skills are general-purpose enough to reuse
